commands.review_summary:
The PR strips terminal malformed `</arg_value>>` suffixes from selected agent read/write/edit path parameters and exec routing fields, preserves payload text, rejects suffix-only guarded paths, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +82, Tests +236. Total +318 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main forwards suffixed read/write/edit path and exec command/routing arguments without cleanup, so a malformed `</arg_value>>` value reaches the active file or exec path unchanged; I did not run a live Windows/DashScope reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the current head is clean, and the remaining action is a maintainer decision on landing this PR versus the overlapping open suffix-fix PR.
